scenarios.name: Happy path — send completes first attempt
log: Step 2: First send attempt with gates: {}
Step 3: Old token retry attempt → BLOCKED: token_already_consumed
Step 4: Can retry? NO — Case is already SENT — retry would cause duplicate
Step 5: Retry not allowed — no new token issued

scenarios.name: Recoverable block — campaign_id missing, fixed on retry
log: Step 2: First send attempt with gates: {"campaign_id":null}
Step 3: Old token retry attempt → BLOCKED: token_already_consumed
Step 5: New review token issued → case status RETRY_NEEDED

scenarios.name: Recoverable block — fix not applied, retry still blocked
log: Step 2: First send attempt with gates: {"campaign_id":null}
Step 3: Old token retry attempt → BLOCKED: token_already_consumed
Step 5: New review token issued → case status RETRY_NEEDED

scenarios.name: Nonrecoverable block — duplicate send guard
log: Step 2: First send attempt with gates: {"existing_send_key_matched":true}
Step 3: Old token retry attempt → BLOCKED: token_already_consumed
Step 4: Can retry? NO — Block is nonrecoverable — operator intervention required
Step 5: Retry not allowed — no new token issued

scenarios.name: Consumed token prevents second submission — new token required
log: Step 2: First send attempt with gates: {"campaign_id":null}
Step 3: Old token retry attempt → BLOCKED: token_already_consumed
Step 5: New review token issued → case status RETRY_NEEDED

scenarios.name: Already SENT — duplicate prevention blocks any retry
log: Step 2: First send attempt with gates: {}
Step 3: Old token retry attempt → BLOCKED: token_already_consumed
Step 4: Can retry? NO — Case is already SENT — retry would cause duplicate
Step 5: Retry not allowed — no new token issued
Step 6: Duplicate-send prevention check → gates passed: false | failed: send_key_unique, not_duplicate

scenarios.name: Transient API error — retry succeeds
log: Step 2: First send attempt with gates: {"campaign_id":null}
Step 3: Old token retry attempt → BLOCKED: token_already_consumed
Step 5: New review token issued → case status RETRY_NEEDED
